description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is predominantly smooth and light-colored, with large rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns across the facade. The property includes a spacious outdoor area with several palm trees, a patio with outdoor seating, and a fenced perimeter for privacy. The main entryway is defined by double glass doors and a small set of steps leading up from the yard. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back slightly from the lower, creating a tiered effect. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious outdoor patio surrounded by palm trees and fencing. The design is minimalist, featuring clean lines and a light exterior.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with multiple large windows and a glimpse of the interior layout, as well as the edge of the outdoor patio.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front yard with several palm trees, the main patio area, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows on the facade.
description_view_2: This view focuses on the rear of the house, showcasing the double glass doors, outdoor dining area, and the fenced backyard.
description_view_3: This view presents the opposite side of the house, emphasizing the flat roof, upper story setback, and additional windows, along with the continuation of the fence and patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors with a small set of steps, minimal overhang, and no porch or columns
